description: Set up the git branch and install dependencies to verify baseline works
steps: In /projects/sandbox/ufqbot, checkout main branch, then create and checkout new branch 'feat/v6-design-and-ocr'
Install Python dependencies: cd test_grader_bot && pip install -r requirements.txt
Run import verification: python -c 'from sheet_generator import generate_answer_sheet; from omr_scanner import scan_answer_sheet; print("Baseline OK")'
Generate a baseline test sheet to confirm it works: python -c 'from sheet_generator import generate_answer_sheet; img = generate_answer_sheet(30, 4); img.save("/tmp/baseline_v5.png"); print("OK")'
acceptance_criteria: On branch feat/v6-design-and-ocr based off main
Baseline sheet generation produces a valid PNG file
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/ufqbot && git branch --show-current (should show feat/v6-design-and-ocr)
Run: cd /projects/sandbox/ufqbot/test_grader_bot && python -c 'from sheet_generator import generate_answer_sheet; from omr_scanner import scan_answer_sheet; print("OK")'
